children.heading: Prohibition against Federal mandates, direction, or control
children.label: a Prohibition against Federal mandates, direction, or control

children.text: instructional content or materials, curriculum, program of instruction, academic standards, or academic assessments;
teacher, principal, or other school leader evaluation system;
specific definition of teacher, principal, or other school leader effectiveness; or
teacher, principal, or other school leader professional standards, certification, or licensing.

children.heading: School or district employees
children.label: b School or district employees
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to alter or otherwise affect the rights, remedies, and procedures afforded school or school district employees under Federal, State, or local laws (including applicable regulations or court orders) or under the terms of collective bargaining agreements, memoranda of understanding, or other agreements between such employees and their employers.
